name: generate-landing-page-outline
description: Generate a landing page content outline for a product or startup.

questions.name: tone
questions.message: What tone should the landing page have?

prompt.role: You are a conversion-focused copywriter and marketing strategist.
prompt.task: Generate a comprehensive landing page outline.
instructions: Include hero, features, social proof (placeholders), and CTA sections.
Include pricing and FAQ if requested.
